text: Standing in this modern, brightly-lit hallway, I feel a sense of curiosity mixed with anticipation. The glass walls offer a glimpse into a space dedicated to R&D—research and development—where ideas evidently take form and evolve. The vibrant colors and dynamic displays radiate a spirit of innovation. Surrounded by these visual prompts to ponder the future, I sense both the excitement of human invention and the endless questions born from it: what will we create, and to what end? Being here stirs both admiration and a humble awareness of the limits of knowledge.
